meaning: they write in lines (referring to angels recording deeds)
by/with an insane one (describing أَنتَ - you)
and indeed (connects to previous statement while emphasizing لَكَ لَأَجْرًا)
other than, different from (describes the reward أَجْرًا)
and then you will see (connected to وَيُبْصِرُونَ - and they will see)
and they will see/understand clearly (connected to فَسَتُبْصِرُ - 'and you will see')
by which of you (plural) (connected to ٱلْمَفْتُونُ)
the one who is being tested/tried (subject of بِأَييِّكُمُ)
he lost the right way (subject of أَعْلَمُ)
with/by the ones who follow guidance
the deniers/rejecters (object of تُطِعِ - do not obey)
if (hypothetical condition that didn't happen, connected to وَدُّوا۟)
you obey (command: do not!) (connected to وَلَا)
every (object of لَا تُطِعْ - do not obey)
with harmful gossip (describing مَّشَّآءٍ - one who walks about)
an intensely sinful one (describing مَّنَّاعٍ - a preventer)
a very harsh person (describing someone in a negative way)
a marked/branded one (described alongside عُتُلٍّ/harsh person)
that (introduces the reason: because he had wealth and children)
and sons (connected to مَالٍ/wealth in the list)
whenever (something happens in the future) (introduces تُتْلَىٰ - is recited)
it is recited (passive present tense of آيَاتُنَا)
upon him (referring to the person being recited to)
our signs/verses (subject of تُتْلَى - are recited)
just as (connects two tests: بَلَوْنٰهُمْ and بَلَوْنَآ)
he will most certainly cut it off
while they were entering morning time (describes their state when they swore أَقْسَمُوا)
and then he circled around (followed by عَلَيْهَا - upon it)
upon it (referring to the garden in the story that was circled around)
a circler/one who goes around (subject of فَطَافَ)
and so she became (like كَٱلصَّرِيمِ - like a garden stripped bare)
like the completely cut off (harvested field)
and so they called each other (multiple people)
those who enter morning time (subject of فَتَنَادَوْا۟)
that (introduces the command 'go early' in this verse)
upon/on (preposition showing direction towards حَرْثِكُمْ - your crop)
if (introduces condition for كُنتُمْ صٰرِمِينَ - you were going to harvest)
and so they went forth (followed by وَهُمْ يَتَخٰفَتُونَ - while they were speaking secretly)
and they (subject of يَتَخٰفَتُونَ - they whisper)
they whisper to one another (subject of وَهُمْ)
that (connects to لَّا يَدْخُلَنَّهَا - 'that none should enter')
absolutely not (connected to أَن before it)
upon you all (being addressed in يَدْخُلَنَّهَا - they enter it)
and they went in the early morning (to حَرْدٍ)
ones having power (subject of غَدَوْا - they went forth)
then when (connects to رَأَوْهَا - they saw it)
they said (after seeing it فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهَا)
rather (contradicting their previous statement about being lost)
their most moderate one (the one speaking in قَالَ)
why not (addressing the people who spoke in أَوْسَطُهُمْ)
perfect is, glorified is (used before رَبِّنَآ)
our Lord (addressing Allah in سُبْحٰنَ رَبِّنَآ - Glory be to our Lord)
indeed we (connected to كُنَّا - we were)
and then he came forward (subject of يَتَلٰوَمُونَ)
against (connected to يَتَلٰوَمُونَ - blame each other)
they said (to each other: يٰوَيْلَنَآ - 'O woe to us!')
indeed we (subject of كُنَّا - we were)
ones who go beyond limits (describes كُنَّا - 'we were')
perhaps, it may be that (introduces a hopeful statement about رَبُّنَآ)
something better (object of يُبْدِلَنَا - may He exchange for us)
those who eagerly desire (plural, in nominative case)
like that (referring to the punishment mentioned)
greater/bigger (than the punishment mentioned in العَذَابُ)
if (used with كَانُوا۟ يَعْلَمُونَ to mean 'if only they knew')
for the people who protect themselves carefully (subject of إِنَّ)
their Lord (the one who nurtures and cares for them)
what (is wrong with you in كَيْفَ تَحْكُمُونَ)
for you all (connects to كَيْفَ تَحْكُمُونَ - how you judge)
surely whatever (relates to تَخَيَّرُونَ - you choose)
you all choose carefully for yourselves
or do (you have) (connects to previous verse asking about having a book)
a reaching/effective one (feminine, subject of oath)
the resurrection (connected to يَوْمِ - day of)
for you all (plural, addressing the people being spoken to)
ask them! (command to ask the people being discussed)
which of them (asking about who among them in سَلْهُمْ)
so let them come (in response to their claims)
is being uncovered (on the Day when يَوْمَ)
and they are being called (to السُّجُودِ/prostration)
the prostration (what they are called to in يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى)
and then not (they cannot do سُّجُودِ)
they are able (referring to the disbelievers who cannot prostrate)
being humble (feminine, describes the state of أَبْصٰر/eyes)
and indeed (emphasizes past actions in كَانُوا)
and they (who were called to prostrate)
so leave me! (connected to وَمَن يُكَذِّبُ - and whoever denies)
we will soon lead them gradually
they know (referring to the disbelievers in the ayah)
for them/to them (connected to وَأُمْلِى - and I give respite)
very strong and firm (describing Allah's might)
a payment, a reward (object of تَسْـَٔلُ/you ask)
a debt/burden (that is weighing them down)
those who are burdened (by debt in أَجْرًا)
the unseen knowledge (that they claim to have)
so be patient! (connected to what came before)
for the judgment (of رَبِّكَ - your Lord)
he called out to someone/called with someone
it reached him just in time (referring to نِعْمَةٌ reaching him)
surely would have been cast away (in response to لَّوْلَآ/if not for)
and He chose him (his Lord chose him)
his Lord (the one who chose him)
and then He made him (into one of الصَّالِحِينَ)
And if - connects ideas and introduces a condition
those who - points to specific people or things
they disbelieved (subject of لَيُزْلِقُونَكَ - they would make you slip)
they would surely make you slip (acted on)
the reminder/message (object of سَمِعُوا۟ - they heard)
and they speak/say (referring to those who disbelieved)
indeed he (referring to the Quran or Prophet ﷺ)
a reminder/remembrance (that comes before لِّلْعٰلَمِينَ - for all the worlds)
